description: Slim-Sachet Version – Portable and Handy Effectively Absorbs Moisture Lasts Up To 30 DAYS Cars,Gym Bags, Drawers, Home, Kitchen, Caravan, Small Spaces – Fits Anywhere 3 Dehumidifiers Per Pack 3 X SLIM-SACHET SMALL SPACE DEHUMIDIFIERS - CARS DRAWERS HOME GYM-BAGS HIGHLIGHTS Slim-Sachet Version – Portable and Handy Effectively Absorbs Moisture (Damp,Mould,Moistures) Lasts Up To 30 DAYS Improves General Air Quality Cars,Gym Bags, Drawers, Home, Kitchen, Caravan, Small Spaces – Fits Anywhere 3 Dehumidifiers Per Pack Easy To Use DIRECTIONS FOR USE Open clear plastic bag and place dehumidifier sachet in desired area, ensuring that the product is not in contact with fabric or painted surfaces, and away from direct reach of children. Replace when full ( holds S0ml) or after 30 days (whichever comes first). Ingredients: Calcium Chloride, Sodium Chloride. CAUTIONARY NOTES Do not use product near sources of food. Do no open the dehumidifier bag during use. Once full, liquid can be disposed of down household sink, and remaining bag should be placed in household waste. NOTE: Original Packing Boxes Included But Flattened, Please Re-Shape and Re-Box On Reception If Required.
